caption: The video captures a small, white private jet taxiing on a wet runway under overcast skies. The aircraft is moving slowly along the tarmac, its landing lights illuminated as it approaches the camera. In the background, another plane can be seen parked on the grassy area adjacent to the runway. The scene suggests a rainy day at an airport, with the wet conditions evident from the sheen on the runway surface. The overall atmosphere is calm and methodical, typical of pre-flight preparations or post-landing procedures. The presence of a windsock near the runway indicates that the airport is actively monitoring weather conditions for safe operations.
